signals.npcLine: Market pulses cold, shadows grow thick. No trust in the coin tonight.
signals.questPulse: Danger looms as crypto tides drop beneath the neon haze.
signals.worldFeed: Global cryptos bleed; fear tightens its grip on net traders.
signals.clueEvent: Chains flicker, value drops encrypted in digital mist.

signals.npcLine: Chip nodes spike—something's stirring beneath the datastream.
signals.questPulse: Signal: CHIP token’s shadow climbs; watch for data breach flickers.
signals.worldFeed: Chatter spikes on CHIP, possible bot swarm or pump schemes.
signals.clueEvent: Anomalies detected around CHIP transactions, trace routes scattered.

signals.npcLine: RAVE nets hum with volatile signals; a trap might drop soon.
signals.questPulse: RAVE’s frequency surges then falters—make your move cautious.
signals.worldFeed: RAVE token flares briefly in dark webs, whispers of a flip.
signals.clueEvent: Digital fingerprint left on RAVE transfers, marker for hunters.

signals.npcLine: GRASS growth slow but steady; maybe a sleeper play for the brave.
signals.questPulse: Watch GRASS under the neon soil—low noise could mean high gain.
signals.worldFeed: Silent movements on GRASS, could signal a hidden uprising.
signals.clueEvent: Subtle spike in GRASS wallets, unknown origin wallets active.

signals.npcLine: AAVE shadows fade and reappear; old debts never fully die here.
signals.questPulse: AAVE nets flicker—hidden flows hint at shifting loyalties.
signals.worldFeed: AAVE watchers report intermittent waves, echoes of past crashes.
signals.clueEvent: Ghost transactions found on AAVE chain, origin unknown.
